title: [Snyk Code] Command Injection
description:
## Command Injection

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Virtuus`
**File:** `tools/ec2_bench_status.py`
**Location:** line 10, column 23 to line 10, column 46
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-78
### Snippet (tools/ec2_bench_status.py:8-12)
```
   8 | def aws_json(args):
   9 |     cmd = ["aws"] + args + ["--output", "json"]
  10 |     return json.loads(subprocess.check_output(cmd, text=True))
  11 | 
  12 | 
```

**Issue Key:** 35e8d6ad-4ef9-41bf-9933-c93aa9939f86

### Details
Command Injection

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Current stance: dismiss. Uses list-form subprocess.check_output() without shell=True. The cmd list is built from hardcoded strings plus developer-supplied --region/--profile CLI flags. No shell interpreter is involved, so CWE-78 injection path does not exist. Pending triple-check before formal dismissal.
